blended.narrative: Copper Mountain is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Mild temps with highs near 41°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Sunday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 8.8" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is building — up 3" over the past week. Current depth: 31".
